SEARCH
Package com.dropbox.core.v2.files

Class ListRevisionsError

java.lang.Object
com.dropbox.core.v2.files.ListRevisionsError
public final class ListRevisionsError extends Object
This class is an open tagged union. Tagged unions instances are always associated to a specific tag. This means only one of the isAbc() methods will return true. You can use tag() to determine the tag associated with this instance.

Open unions may be extended in the future with additional tags. If a new tag is introduced that this SDK does not recognized, the OTHER value will be used.

  • Field Details

    • INVALID_BEFORE_REV

      public static final ListRevisionsError INVALID_BEFORE_REV
      The revision in before_rev is invalid.

    • BEFORE_REV_NOT_SUPPORTED

      public static final ListRevisionsError BEFORE_REV_NOT_SUPPORTED
      The before_rev argument is only supported in path mode.

    • OTHER

      public static final ListRevisionsError OTHER
      Catch-all used for unknown tag values returned by the Dropbox servers.

      Receiving a catch-all value typically indicates this SDK version is not up to date. Consider updating your SDK version to handle the new tags.

  • Method Details

    • tag

      public ListRevisionsError.Tag tag()
      Returns the tag for this instance.

      This class is a tagged union. Tagged unions instances are always associated to a specific tag. This means only one of the isXyz() methods will return true. Callers are recommended to use the tag value in a switch statement to properly handle the different values for this ListRevisionsError.

      If a tag returned by the server is unrecognized by this SDK, the ListRevisionsError.Tag.OTHER value will be used.

      Returns:
      the tag for this instance.

    • isPath

      public boolean isPath()
      Returns true if this instance has the tag ListRevisionsError.Tag.PATH, false otherwise.
      Returns:
      true if this instance is tagged as ListRevisionsError.Tag.PATH, false otherwise.

    • path

      public static ListRevisionsError path(LookupError value)
      Returns an instance of ListRevisionsError that has its tag set to ListRevisionsError.Tag.PATH.

      None

      Parameters:
      value - value to assign to this instance.
      Returns:
      Instance of ListRevisionsError with its tag set to ListRevisionsError.Tag.PATH.
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if value is null.

    • getPathValue

      public LookupError getPathValue()
      This instance must be tagged as ListRevisionsError.Tag.PATH.
      Returns:
      The LookupError value associated with this instance if isPath() is true.
      Throws:
      IllegalStateException - If isPath() is false.

    • isInvalidBeforeRev

      public boolean isInvalidBeforeRev()
      Returns true if this instance has the tag ListRevisionsError.Tag.INVALID_BEFORE_REV, false otherwise.

      true if this instance is tagged as ListRevisionsError.Tag.INVALID_BEFORE_REV, false otherwise.

      public boolean isOther()
      Returns true if this instance has the tag ListRevisionsError.Tag.OTHER, false otherwise.
